question.label: Done definition
question.name: What does “done” mean to you on your current tickets?
question.description: Checks whether his working definition of completion matches the team’s expectation.

answer: I usually wait too long before asking because I want to solve things myself first.

assessment.note: He describes delaying questions because he is unsure when to ask, which signals a strong lack of clarity about expectations and escalation.

new_queue.name: Where do the handoffs still feel fuzzy?

new_queue.name: What feels uncertain right before you ship?

new_queue.label: Support cadence
new_queue.name: What kind of check-in from me would help you most over the next two weeks?

new_queue.label: Fastest unblock
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
